CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of GiftEntry API field names whose values will be copied from the employee gift entry to the newly created employer gift entry. The batch will skip any field it cannot set (e.g. formula or read-only fields) and log a warning. Example: GiftBatchId;GiftReceivedDate;CurrencyIsoCode;GiftDesignation1Id;GiftDesignation2Id
CustomField.label: Fields To Copy (semicolon-separated)
